entries.definition:
كتاب الواو

وضم

(وطر) : الواو والطاء والراء: كلمةٌ واحدة. الوَطَر: الحاجَة والنَّهْمَة، لا يُبنَى منه فِعل.

عَامًا وَيُحَرِّمُونَهُ عَامًا لِيُواطِئُوا عِدَّةَ مَا حَرَّمَ اللَّهُ they will allow it one year—
and forbid it one year—in order to conform with the number of
what God has forbidden.

وَطْء waṭʾ [v. n.] trampling, pressure, compulsion, force,
impression (73:6) إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ اللَّيْلِ هِيَ أَشَدُّ وَطْئًا indeed, night prayers
make a deeper impression.

مَوْطِئ mawṭiʾ [n. of place] a place where the foot steps,
foothold (9:120) وَلَا يَطَئُونَ مَوْطِئًا يَغِيظُ الْكُفَّارَ they do not step in a
place that angers the disbelievers.
entries.definition_english:
عَامًا وَيُحَرِّمُونَهُ عَامًا لِيُواطِئُوا عِدَّةَ مَا حَرَّمَ اللَّهُ they will allow it one year—
and forbid it one year—in order to conform with the number of
what God has forbidden.

وَطْء waṭʾ [v. n.] trampling, pressure, compulsion, force,
impression (73:6) إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ اللَّيْلِ هِيَ أَشَدُّ وَطْئًا indeed, night prayers
make a deeper impression.

مَوْطِئ mawṭiʾ [n. of place] a place where the foot steps,
foothold (9:120) وَلَا يَطَئُونَ مَوْطِئًا يَغِيظُ الْكُفَّارَ they do not step in a
place that angers the disbelievers.

entries.definition:
w–ṭ–r purpose, goal, desire, want. Of this root, only وَطَر waṭar,
occurs twice in the Qur’an.

وَطَر waṭar [n.] want, purpose, term (33:37) فَلَمَّا قَضَى زَيْدٌ مِنْهَا وَطَرًا
when Zayd had formally ended his marriage to her [lit.
completed a purpose from her], We gave her to you in marriage.
